since_last: 57% of 89 AI names green; Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical leads +1.74%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 57% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +1.18% · BTC -1.46% · Gold +0.38% · Nasdaq100 +2.25%. 57% of 89 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical is doing the heavy lifting at +1.74%.

cards.headline: Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at +1.74%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.36%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AVAV is the standout at +23.64%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +23.64%, TLN +7.43%, AMAT +3.48%, LRCX +2.57%, SMCI +2.01%. Laggards: DLR -4.96%, TTD -3.22%, HON -1.90%, SAP -1.17%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.96% at $162.61
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.96% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
